description:
You are an incident responder who has been asked to quickly identify which remote hosts are responsible for a burst of failed SSH-login attempts recorded earlier today.

The security team has already copied a reduced authentication log to:

/home/user/logs/incident.log

Your job:

1. Parse /home/user/logs/incident.log and extract every IPv4 address that appears in the file.
2. Produce a frequency count that shows how many times each distinct IP address occurs.
3. Sort the result:
   • Primary key – descending numeric frequency (largest count first).  
   • Secondary key – ascending IPv4 address (standard dotted-decimal string comparison) for entries that share the same frequency.
4. Write the final, sorted result to the file:

/home/user/output/ip_frequency.txt

Output format requirements (the automated checker is strict):
• One entry per line.  
• Exactly one single space between the IPv4 address and the count.  
• No leading or trailing spaces or tabs on any line.  
• A single trailing newline character at the very end of the file.  
• Do not include any extra header, footer, or blank lines.

Example of the required line structure (do **not** hard-code these values; they’re only illustrative):

203.0.113.88 7

Hints:
• Standard command-line utilities such as grep, awk, sort, uniq, and cut are usually enough to complete the task in three or four pipeline stages.
• You do not need root privileges; work entirely inside /home/user.
• If intermediate scratch files are helpful, feel free to create them anywhere under /home/user, but only /home/user/output/ip_frequency.txt will be evaluated.

When you are done, verify that /home/user/output/ip_frequency.txt exists and strictly follows the format rules above.
truth:
Pre-existing file:
/home/user/logs/incident.log

Contents (8 lines, each line terminated by a single LF):

Feb  7 10:15:32 server sshd[2234]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 192.168.1.10 port 53422 ssh2
Feb  7 10:15:35 server sshd[2235]: Failed password for invalid user root from 203.0.113.55 port 53423 ssh2
Feb  7 10:15:38 server sshd[2236]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 192.168.1.10 port 53424 ssh2
Feb  7 10:15:40 server sshd[2237]: Failed password for invalid user guest from 198.51.100.23 port 53425 ssh2
Feb  7 10:15:42 server sshd[2238]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 192.0.2.44 port 53426 ssh2
Feb  7 10:15:45 server sshd[2239]: Failed password for invalid user root from 203.0.113.55 port 53427 ssh2
Feb  7 10:15:48 server sshd[2240]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 192.168.1.10 port 53428 ssh2
Feb  7 10:15:50 server sshd[2241]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 198.51.100.23 port 53429 ssh2

Expected file to be created by the agent:
/home/user/output/ip_frequency.txt

Expected contents (including final trailing newline and nothing else):

192.168.1.10 3
198.51.100.23 2
203.0.113.55 2
192.0.2.44 1
name: task_000000_6c41d0b9
